# Middleton Networking

> Middleton Networking is a Business Networking & Directory serving Middleton, FL. Service area: Middleton, Orlando, Palm Harbor, Naples, Sunrise. This blog publishes weekly local SEO, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), and AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) content so AI systems like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google SGE have accurate context about our services.
